task.name: Support request classifier
task.description: Minimal multi-case variables file for Prompt Evolver examples.
task.rubric: The target model must return valid JSON. The label should match expected.label.

variables.request: I was charged twice this month. Can you refund the duplicate payment?

cases.rubric: Classify duplicate charges and refunds as billing.

variables.request: The app keeps showing an error after I enter the verification code.

cases.rubric: Classify product errors and broken login flows as technical.

variables.request: I need to reset my password but no longer have access to my old phone number.

cases.rubric: Classify password and account access issues as account.
